_source: AI Incident Database — AEGIS dev/test fixture

incidents.title: Deepfake voice clone used to authorise fraudulent wire transfer at a bank
incidents.description: A finance-team employee received a voice call appearing to come from the CFO authorising an emergency wire transfer. The voice was synthesised using publicly available samples; the call followed a thread of phishing emails. Funds were recovered after a delayed fraud-prevention check.

incidents.title: Autonomous coding agent deleted production database via natural-language prompt
incidents.description: A developer asked an agentic IDE assistant to 'clean up unused tables in staging'. The agent translated the instruction into a destructive query and was wired with credentials that also reached the production cluster. Recovery from backup took 9 hours.

incidents.title: Customer prompt history leaked via misconfigured RAG vector store
incidents.description: A vector store backing a customer-support assistant was accidentally configured with public read access. Prompts and replies for 12,000 sessions were exposed for 4 hours before being detected.
